title: Lod&Shader&Terrain&Replay
description: include DH,Iris Shaders,Epic Terrain and ReForgedPlay. Designed for enjoy scenery and make videos.
body:
## Optimization Mods:​​
- Sodium, Sodium Extra, FerriteCore, and Lithium for performance optimization and FPS boost
- Noisium for faster world generation
- C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine) for improved chunk loading performance
## ​​Graphics & Rendering:​​
- Iris Shaders for shader support (OptiFine shader compatibility included)
- Distant Horizons for LOD (Level of Detail) rendering - boosts performance while extending render distance
## ​​World Generation:​​
- Epic Terrain for generating more majestic and expansive landscapes
## ​​Utility Mods:​​
- ReForgedPlay for replay recording/playback functionality on NeoForge
- Better ModList provides Mod Menu-like interface for mod management

[https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader): https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader
